name: Biryani
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 4 tablespoons of butter in a heavy frying pan and sauté almonds, cashews, and raisins for about 2 minutes.
2. Stir the nut mixture into Saffron Rice.
3. To Serve: Spread 1/3 of the saffron rice mixture evenly in an ovenproof dish. Spread half of the meat mixture over the rice. Repeat once again and finish with the final 1/3 of the rice. About 30 minutes before serving, heat the chicken stock, add the remaining butter to the stock, and pour it over the rice and meat dish. Cover and bake in an oven preheated to 350°F for 20 - 25 minutes or until all liquid is absorbed.
4. Serve trimmed with tomato slices, green pepper rings, and fresh coriander.
